name: Royal Enfied Meteor 350
desc: The Royal Enfield Meteor 350 is a popular cruiser motorcycle available for rent across India, often marketed as a perfect, easy-to-handle bike for both city commuting and leisurely highway touring. It is known for its relaxed, upright riding posture and comfortable, low-slung seating.
availableAt: Near Attapur, Piller No.102. Near mehdipatnam.

name: Royal Enfied Thunderbird 350 X
desc: The Royal Enfield Thunderbird 350X is a popular, stylish cruiser motorcycle often available for rent, specifically designed for highway touring with modern aesthetic updates. It is ideal for long-distance adventure trips, offering a comfortable, upright seating position.
availableAt: Near Attapur, Piller No.102. Near mehdipatnam.

name: Suzuki Burgman 125
desc: The Suzuki Burgman Street 125 is a premium "mini maxi-scooter" widely available for rent in Indian cities like Hyderabad, Bangalore, and Mumbai. It is popular for its comfortable, relaxed seating posture and refined 125cc engine, making it ideal for city commuting and leisurely rides.
availableAt: Near Attapur, Piller No.102. Near mehdipatnam.

name: Suzuki Burgman 125
desc: The Suzuki Burgman Street 125 is a popular, premium-segment "mini maxi-scooter" often listed for rent in urban areas. It is designed to offer a comfortable, stylish, and powerful commuting experience.

name: Suzuki Burgman 125
desc: The Suzuki Burgman Street 125 in Pearl Mirage White is a premium, maxi-styled scooter frequently available for rent, known for its comfortable, "sofa-like" seating and impressive road presence. It is often chosen for urban commuting, daily rentals, and short-distance weekend trips due to its refined 124cc engine, smooth handling, and large 21.5-liter storage capacity

name: Suzuki Burgman 125
desc: The Suzuki Burgman Street 125 is a popular, premium-segment "mini maxi-scooter" often listed for rent in urban areas. It is designed to offer a comfortable, stylish, and powerful commuting experience.

name: Suzuki Burgman 125
desc: The Suzuki Burgman Street 125 is a 124cc maxi-style scooter, starting around ₹1.02 lakh. It features a 124cc engine (8.42 PS/10.2 Nm), an Auto Stop-Start (EASS) system for efficiency, and is known for its comfortable riding position. Key features include LED headlights, a 24.6L under-seat storage, and Bluetooth connectivity on higher variants.

name: ACTIVA 5G
desc: The Honda Activa 5G  is a 110cc automatic scooter known for its traditional, glossy brown finish, full metal body, and premium chrome garnish on the front apron. It features a 109.19cc HET engine, LED headlight, and digital-analog instrument cluster, offering a reliable, classic look designed for everyday, practical commuting

name: ACTIVA 4G
desc: The Honda Activa 4G in offering a premium and classic look for the popular 110cc automatic scooter.

name: ACTIVA 4G
desc: The Honda Activa 4G is a reliable 109.19cc scooter, featuring a BS-IV compliant HET engine that produces 8 bhp and 9 Nm torque. It boasts a durable full metal body, 60 kmpl (ARAI) mileage, Combi-Brake System (CBS), and a 5.3-liter fuel tank. Key features include tubeless tyres, 18L storage, and a mobile charging socket.

name: ACTIVA 4G
desc: The Honda Activa 4G was a popular automatic scooter known for its reliable 109.2cc HET engine, full metal body, and 50–60 kmpl mileage. Launched as a BS-IV compliant model, it features AHO (Always Headlamp On), 8 bhp power, and 9 Nm torque, making it a dependable, family-friendly choice

name: ACTIVA 3G
desc: The Honda Activa 3G was a popular automatic scooter known for its reliable 109.2cc HET engine, full metal body, and 50–60 kmpl mileage. Launched as a BS-IV compliant model, it features AHO (Always Headlamp On), 8 bhp power, and 9 Nm torque, making it a dependable, family-friendly choice

name: ACTIVA 6G
desc: The Honda Activa 6G is a highly reliable 109.51cc BS6-compliant scooter known for its fuel-efficient, smooth performance, and premium, durable design. Key features include a 7.79-7.99 PS engine, H-Smart keyless technology, telescopic suspension, and 59.5 kmpl estimated mileage, making it a market leader for daily commuting.

name: KTM DUKE 250
desc: The 2023 KTM Duke 250 is a 249cc, BS6 Phase 2-compliant naked street bike featuring a 30.57 bhp liquid-cooled engine, 6-speed gearbox with slipper clutch, and 25Nm torque. It features a 390-style trellis frame, full LED lighting, LCD display, and switchable dual-channel ABS with supermoto mode, available in two colors: Dark Galvano and Ebony Black.

name: YAMAHA R15 V3
desc: Yamaha R15 V4 is a 155cc, OBD-II compliant, fully-faired sportbike featuring a 18.1 bhp liquid-cooled engine, traction control, quick-shifter (on select variants), and dual-channel ABS. Updates include new color options (Intensity White, Dark Knight) and standard USD forks, offering a high-performance, tech-laden track-focused experience for everyday commuting.

name: Royal Enfield Classic Reborn.
desc: The Royal Enfield Classic 350 "Reborn" (launched late 2021) is a comprehensive redesign of the iconic retro motorcycle, featuring a new J-series 349cc engine, twin-downtube chassis, and upgraded suspension. It blends 1950s G2-inspired styling with modern technology, including optional Tripper navigation, USB charging, and improved braking.
